testcase.name: test_waitlist_reserved_handle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lusorae_phase2_3.py:123: in test_waitlist_reserved_handle assert r2.status_code == 409, f"expected 409 reserved, got {r2.status_code} {r2.text}" E AssertionError: expected 409 reserved, got 429 {"detail":"Demasiadas tentativas. Aguarda um minuto e tenta novamente."} E assert 429 == 409 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_post_creation_normal
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lusorae_phase2_3.py:292: in test_post_creation_normal assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"normal post should succeed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: normal post should succeed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","content"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"body":"Bom dia a todos! Hoje vou ao Porto."},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
